title: Coinbase Trading Product
description: A trading product representing a cryptocurrency trading pair on Coinbase. Products define the parameters for trading between two currencies including minimum sizes, increments, and trading status.

product_id.description: Unique identifier for the product, typically formatted as BASE-QUOTE

base_min_size.description: Minimum order size in base currency

base_max_size.description: Maximum order size in base currency

base_increment.description: Minimum size increment for orders in base currency

quote_min_size.description: Minimum order value in quote currency

quote_max_size.description: Maximum order value in quote currency

quote_increment.description: Minimum price increment in quote currency

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the trading pair

status.description: Current trading status of the product

margin_enabled.description: Whether margin trading is enabled for this product

post_only.description: Whether the product is in post-only mode

limit_only.description: Whether only limit orders are accepted

cancel_only.description: Whether only order cancellations are allowed
